item.description: Cardinal Parolin: Youth mental health requires structural responses  Vatican NewsPope: Education should help young people find themselves and others  Vatican NewsYouth need an “inner life” with ability to ask questions: Pope Leo  aleteia.orgPope Leo: "We are not algorithms; we must help young people living under the yoke of expectations."  Agenzia NovaEducation as resistance: Pope Leo’s challenge to universities  Catholic Outlook

item.title: UAE joined US-Israeli war against Iran from the outset: Report - Middle...
item.description: UAE joined US-Israeli war against Iran from the outset: Report  Middle East EyeExclusive | The U.A.E.’s Secret Role in the War Involved Dozens of Strikes on Iran  WSJUAE struck Iran dozens of times, with US and Israeli intel, during war and amid truce — WSJ  The Times of IsraelGulf's other war: Inside UAE's hidden role behind strikes on Iran despite ceasefire — Report  The Times of IndiaDid strained Saudi ties push UAE close to Israel? Emirates struck Iran several times during war with Netanyahu's support: Report  theweek.in
